_publications._publicationTitle: Genetically mediated Nf1 loss in mice promotes diverse radiation-induced tumors modeling second malignant neoplasms.

_contextSnippet: solid tumor free survival and hematologic disease free survival were both reduced in a dose-dependent manner in Nf1+/− mice but not WT mice (Figure 3, log rank test, p<0.0001 for solid tumor free survival in Nf1+/− mice and p=0.0001 for hematologic disease free survival in Nf1+/− mice)
details: Solid tumor free survival and hematologic disease free survival were both reduced in a dose-dependent manner (log rank test, p<0.0001 for solid tumor free survival and p=0.0001 for hematologic disease free survival)
